subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: Faith outwardly means to believe in the message a Manifestation brings to the world... But, in reality, Faith embodies three degrees
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of faith; certitude, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @goodly deeds; actions, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @second birth
